Name: Stripe integration - Individual + Multi-Site checkout
Description: Zero revenue until this ships. Checkout flow for Individual and Multi-Site tiers.

Name: Stripe integration - Authority invoicing/subscriptions
Description: Council deals need payment mechanism. Invoice or subscription model for Authority tiers.

Name: Terms of Service update - self-assessment disclaimer
Description: Add limitation of liability. Key line: Access Compass provides guided self-assessment tools not professional accessibility advice.

Name: Professional indemnity insurance - get quote and purchase
Description: Legal protection before first paying customer. Non-negotiable.

Name: Package the council program offer (one-pager)
Description: One clear sellable thing: Access Compass Council Program. Light / Guided / Full delivery options. See growth bible for details.

Name: Create Business Getting Started Guide (PDF)
Description: 2-4 page PDF for businesses enrolled in council programs. See prompt-onboarding-assets.md for full spec.

Name: Create Council Outreach Email Templates (6 templates)
Description: Invitation / Reminder / Halfway / Completion / Re-assessment / Wrap-up. See prompt-onboarding-assets.md.

Name: Create One-Page Program Overview (PDF)
Description: For council internal stakeholders. What / Why / How / Included / Cost / Timeline. See prompt-onboarding-assets.md.

Name: Update pricing page - add Program Support grouping + facilitation CTA
Description: Reframe Authority tiers from software to program. Add one line below tiers: Need hands-on support? Talk to us.

Name: Prepare CoM proposal (program-framed)
Description: Position as structured accessibility program not a tool. Guided Program at founding partner rate. See growth bible for pricing.

Name: Set up case study capture template
Description: Template for documenting: what we did / what happened / what they said. Start capturing from day 1 of any pilot.

Name: Personal outreach to 10-15 warm contacts
Description: Email and LinkedIn. Mix of businesses and council contacts. You do this yourself first before hiring VA.

Name: Call with Josie - present CoM proposal
Description: Present the program. Ask: Would CoM want to pilot this with the current DAE cohort?

Name: Scope and close CoM pilot deal
Description: Agree pricing (founders rate 30-40% off). Send contract. Target: $13K-$23K deal.

Name: Announce paid tiers to existing free users
Description: Email to current users about Starter and Committed tiers.

Name: LinkedIn post - Access Compass is live
Description: What it does / who it helps / link to free tier.

Name: Deliver kickoff webinar to first program businesses
Description: Use the slide deck created in onboarding assets. Record for reuse.

Name: Create Kickoff Webinar Slide Deck
Description: 15-20 slides. See prompt-onboarding-assets.md for full spec.

Name: Create Council Admin Quick Start Guide (PDF)
Description: 2 pages. How to use Authority Portal. See prompt-onboarding-assets.md.

Name: Target 5-10 individual paying customers
Description: Warm network only: personal contacts / training alumni / program participants. Free tier as entry point.

Name: Begin documenting CoM case study
Description: Completion rates / business feedback / council outcomes. Capture from day 1.

Name: Write VA job brief
Description: 10-15 hrs/week. AU-based. $25-$35/hr. Prospect list building / outreach / follow-ups / CRM.

Name: Hire VA
Description: Only after you have done 15-20 outreach emails yourself and know what works.

Name: Schedule first monthly webinar
Description: Accessibility in Practice series. Only after first deal closes and you have a story to tell.

Name: Start broader council outreach (5-10 new councils)
Description: Use CoM proof. VA builds prospect lists. Personalised outreach from templates.

Name: First association conversation (pick 2)
Description: Tourism body + one other. Co-branded program pitch. See sales playbook for templates.

Name: LinkedIn content rhythm - 1 post per week
Description: Accessibility insights / product updates / industry commentary.

Name: Publish CoM case study (1-page PDF + landing page)
Description: How CoM deployed accessibility assessment across X businesses. Results and outcomes.

Name: Publish 1-2 business case studies
Description: One hospitality / one retail or events. Before/after story.

Name: Close 2-3 additional council deals
Description: Using CoM case study as proof. Mix of warm network and VA-sourced leads.

Name: Deliver 2-3 facilitation engagements
Description: $5K-$30K each. Refine packages based on what works.

Name: Reach 50+ businesses on platform
Description: Combination of council programs and individual subscribers.

Name: Scale council pipeline to 10-15 conversations
Description: VA builds prospect lists. Personalised outreach. Target: close 3-5.

Name: Close 2-3 association partnerships
Description: Member discount / co-branded page / joint webinar model.

Name: Refine facilitation packages from delivery experience
Description: Light / Guided / Full. Standardise what works. Reduce your hours per council.

Name: Submit speaking abstracts for 2027 conferences
Description: ALGA / state LGA conferences / tourism / disability sector. Innovation streams.

Name: Pitch for podcast appearances
Description: AU business / disability / local government / tourism podcasts. VA researches and pitches.

Name: Apply for grants and awards
Description: Social enterprise grants / innovation awards / disability sector awards.

Name: Start insurance conversations (QBE / Suncorp / Allianz)
Description: Head of ESG or Partnerships via LinkedIn. Need 50+ businesses on platform first.

Name: Research state-level partnership opportunities
Description: Visit Victoria / DJSIR / State disability services. Need 5+ council case studies first.

Name: Scope and build Accessibility Guide Generator
Description: Auto-generate public accessibility guide from assessment data. $99/yr. Zero marginal cost.

Name: Prepare investment materials
Description: Pitch deck / financials / growth metrics. For Creel Price / Startmate / Blackbird / impact investors.

Name: Approach state government with regional pilot proposal
Description: 5 councils in one region / 6 months / state-funded. Use council case studies as proof.

Name: Hire customer success manager (first full-time hire)
Description: Handles council onboarding and business support. Frees you for sales and strategy.

Name: Hire sales/BD person (second hire)
Description: Dedicated council pipeline. You shift to strategic partnerships and product.

Name: Launch Verified Badge (Tier 3)
Description: Partner with 5-10 accessibility consultants. They verify for $500-$2K. You take 25% platform fee.

Name: Launch insurance co-branded offering
Description: Access Compass Assessed businesses save X% on public liability.

Name: Scope international licensing (UK / US / EU)
Description: Research Equality Act / ADA / EAA markets. Identify licensing partners. One conference trip.

Name: Build industry-specific packaging
Description: Hospitality / Events / Healthcare editions. Same platform / tailored branding / premium pricing.
